name: overlord
description: Overlord mission protocol workflow for Claude Code — attach/update/ask/deliver, slash commands, and hook-driven activity capture.

overlord_url.title: Overlord URL
overlord_url.description: Overlord platform URL (e.g. https://www.ovld.ai or http://localhost:3000).

user_token.title: User token
user_token.description: Overlord USER_TOKEN for non-interactive CLI authentication. Create one with `ovld user-token create`; the raw `out_...` secret is shown once. The connector passes this value to `ovld protocol` as Overlord_USER_TOKEN.
